# Exploratory Data Analysis

## Dataset Overview

<!--
- Source: NACC UDS (Uniform Data Set)
- Number of observations, patients, visits
- Time span of data collection
-->

```{python}
#| label: load-data
#| echo: true

import pandas as pd
from scipy.stats import mannwhitneyu

base_path = '../../data/'

data_with_groups = pd.read_csv(base_path + 'data_with_groups.csv')
data_invest = pd.read_csv(base_path + 'investigator_nacc72.csv')
data_biom = pd.read_csv(base_path + 'bio_marker.csv')
```

```{python}
display(data_with_groups.head())
set(data_with_groups['Group'])
print(set(data_with_groups['Group']))
```


## Demographic Summary

```{python}
#| label: demographics-summary

# Age, sex, education distributions
# Table or visualization of demographic breakdown by group
```

## Cognitive Score Distributions

```{python}
#| label: cognitive-distributions

# Distribution plots for key cognitive tests (MMSE, MoCA, CDR, etc.)
# Stratified by group (NL→NL vs NL→MCI)
```

## Missing Data Analysis

```{python}
#| label: missing-data

# Heatmap or bar chart of missing values per feature
# Special attention to biomarker missingness
```

## Class Balance

```{python}
#| label: class-balance

# Group distribution: how many NL→NL, NL→MCI, MCI→NL, MCI→AD, etc.
# Discuss imbalance and potential strategies (SMOTE, class weights)
```

## Correlation Structure

```{python}
#| label: correlation-matrix

# Correlation heatmap of cognitive features
# Identify highly correlated pairs (multicollinearity)
```
